title: 8 Places a Godly Man Can't Fake It
caption:
There's a version of you for church, a version for the group chat, and a version for when you're actually alone.

Even the darkness is not dark to you; the night is as bright as the day. (Psalm 139:12)

8 places the real version shows up whether you meant it to or not.

#faith #christianmen #integrity #manofgod #godlymen #discipline
